center.name: 恩加米湖
center.summary: Lake Ngami is an endorheic lake in Botswana, north of the Kalahari Desert.

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in wet habitats, congregating at the shores of waterbodies, such as Lake Ngami, during flooding
